title: 8 Herbal Creams For Varicose Veins
description: Vitis vinifera creams contain a combination of properties and constituents that help alleviate varicose veins. The cream is rich in flavonoids, particularly rutin and quercetin, which have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. These compounds help to improve blood vessel function, reduce inflammation, and strengthen the walls of blood vessels, thereby improving circulation and reducing the appearance of varicose veins.
